chapters.title: You can attract any woman you desire with good conversations
chapters.text:
You may have had to battle shyness and rejection in the past. That's okay. None of it is your fault, and many other guys struggle with it too.

But know that you can and should outgrow shyness. It has its positive side, but it isn’t easy to succeed with women when you don't show self-confidence. To flirt with and captivate your desired woman successfully, you need to be bold enough to walk up to her. That boldness will also sustain the conversation long enough to get her interested in you.

Being around guys who are good at talking to women can accelerate the progress of your conversational skills.

Contrary to what many guys believe, you don’t need to be very good-looking or rich to attract stunning women. It's easy to think that you need these two qualities since most good-looking and rich men you know have women flocking around them. But the thing is, rich men became rich by mastering several social skills that naturally attracted women to them. The same goes for good-looking guys. Right from childhood, they've had the privilege of enormous social contact because of their looks. These social contacts taught them skills they now use to keep women around.

You can replicate the results, even if you have neither of those qualities, as long as you learn these people skills. Top on the skills list is the ability to have good conversations. Learn it, and women are yours. Are you feeling a bit skeptical? Don't worry. You'll prove it yourself after learning and practicing the conversation principles in this summary.

We'll go straight to business. The remaining chapters of this summary will teach you step-by-step all you need to know about becoming a conversation Casanova.

Did you know? Improving your conversation skills can help you have a fantastic sex life. Few things turn women on more than well-tailored erotic talks.

chapters.title: Your mindset is the foundation for great conversation
chapters.text:
Your mindset plays a significant role in your dating life. For instance, it determines how you react to minor issues in dating, such as your partner not replying to your text for a day. A negative mindset may lead you to start feeling insecure concerning this resulting in picking a fight with your partner.

A negative or bad mindset will always fire negativity back to you no matter how successful you are with women. No woman enjoys an insecure guy.

On the other hand, a positive mindset exudes your confidence; it boosts your flirtatious abilities too.

How you think affects everything you do, including how you act and the outcome.

Casanova Mindset 1: Responsibility for my life sits with me and me alone.

Thinking in this way allows you to understand that if you want something, it’s up to you to go out and get it. Only you can make it happen. A mindset like this is also very useful for avoiding negative self-talk and insecurity. The reins of control are in your hands.

Casanova Mindset 2: I'm enough and don’t need anyone’s approval to feel complete.

This mindset will help you overcome the need for validation and prevent needy behavior and shallow conversations. When you focus on validations alone, you miss the opportunity of getting to know a wonderful woman, and then you start living up to other people’s values.

Average is boring. Women like men who succeed in the face of adversity, overcome obstacles, and have purpose. ~ Dave Perrotta

Casanova Mindset 3: I have a mission and a purpose; women are not my priority.

If you make women your priority, you will rely too much on them to feel value and accomplishment, which can ruin your conversations and relationship with them.

Casanova Mindset 4: There is no reason why I wouldn't attract a woman to me

You have to believe that every woman sees you as attractive. That way, you’re not counting yourself out of a possible interaction before it begins. This mindset will also improve your confidence.

chapters.title: Focus on overcoming your fears and tapping into your manhood
chapters.text:
When you come across a beautiful lady and are somewhat scared to approach her, here's what to do. Remind yourself that the worst that can happen is talking to her and things not working out the way you want. After that, go right to her and start a conversation. Do it, even if you are afraid. That's the only way you grow.

One of the greatest discoveries a man makes, one of his greatest surprises is to find he can do what he was afraid he couldn’t do. ~ Henry Ford

Here's some more wisdom to equip you:

• Change your perspective.
Stop feeling the fear and start seeing that you're missing out greatly. By refusing to approach women you're attracted to, you're throwing away your chances of having great sex and fulfilling relationships with beautiful women.

• Stop waiting for the right moment.
There's no such thing as the right time for dating. You won't find the right moment if you keep waiting for it. Take a step and walk towards the lady you are attracted to instead of waiting and building up fear in your head. This action will help you get rid of your excuses as well.

• Tap into your manhood.
This part is for when you start hanging out with the woman.

What do you find alluring about this woman? Focus on that; she will instantly notice through your body language and eye contact. She will also start to mirror your excitement.

Disrespectfully teasing a woman will cause her to dislike you, even if she laughs temporarily.

Did you know? No matter how confident you are, you’ll always be nervous when approaching a new woman.

chapters.title: Starting a conversation with any girl depends on the environment, the girl, and your goals
chapters.text:
There are different ways to begin a conversation with a woman. What you say to start the conversation depends on the time of day, the lady, what she was doing when you met her, and your goals.

Five easy ways to start a conversation:

• Be direct.
Don't stutter or try to beat about the bush. Be quick to make your interest known. If you speak calmly and look genuinely pleased, you will appear confident and may stand a chance.

Here's an example for you. Let's imagine you see a girl at an event and want to start a conversation. Walk up to her and say something like, “Hi, I know this is a bit random, but you're just too cute to ignore. I'm (insert your name).” The conversation will flow from there.

• Use situations to your advantage.
This means you look at your surroundings and choose something which helps you to kickstart the chat. It's best used at social events or when you and the lady are stationary. For example, if you’re waiting in a taxi queue and you see a new restaurant advertised across the road, you could say, “is that new restaurant chain any good?”

• “Where is Starbucks?”
This method works best during the day. Once you locate the lady you want to approach, walk towards her and ask her if she knows where Starbucks is. Of course, you're not restricted to Starbucks. The principle here is to ask a question that will make anyone speak to a stranger. Understand the principle and use it as you please. For instance, you could say, “I'm new in this block,” instead of Starbucks. “Please, where's the nearest bank?”

Delivering your conversation lines with a smile indicates to the girl that you are fun to be around.

• The simple introduction.
This method doesn't require you to act cute and lovey-dovey. Just approach the lady and start with, “Hey, I’m (your name). What's up?”

• The seahorse vs. octopus.
This method can be used anytime but best at night. It involves using opinion-type conversation starters. This is a particularly useful way to start chatting because it’s ranging and can be used with more than one person. Think of something you want an opinion on, then walk up to the lady and ask.

chapters.title: Women will shut you out if you can’t make a great first impression
chapters.text:
The way you speak and your body language combine to form a first impression. Here are some first impression mistakes and how you can avoid them:

• Talking too fast.
Men often make the mistake of rushing their words. They think they’ll miss their opportunity if they don’t rush. This is not true, and the reverse is often the case.

The solution to this is to take things slow. Avoid being nervous and speak the way you would to a fellow man.

Talking too fast to a woman you just met signals to her subconscious that you're insecure.

• Speedy, anxious movements.
Making jittery movements and walking or appearing in an unconfident manner is usually noticed by women. It can ruin your chances with them.

Powerful and sexy men know how to seduce with their walking steps and charming smiles. Walking slowly and smiling as you get closer will make women notice you quickly. It also increases your sexual appeal.

• Looking too serious or too goofy.
When you take a conversation too seriously, you scare off the woman you're trying to seduce. The solution to this is chipping sexy smiles into the discussion; anyone can do it.

Let's try it. Part your lips in a half-smile. Show very little teeth. Curve your lower lip to make it even more attractive. Hold it for a few seconds.

That wasn't hard, was it? Practice it the next time you're with a beauty.

• Slouching and darting eyes.
Learn to adjust your posture consciously. Guys who succeed with girls don’t slouch or put their heads down while talking. You can develop a strong posture by practicing yoga. Don't fancy yoga classes? Think about it; you may come in contact with beautiful ladies at yoga. Who knows, right?

Maintaining good eye contact is also powerful as it sends out bonding chemicals like oxytocin. Darting eyes will always ruin the first impression; it portrays you as someone sinister.

• Talking with a high-pitched voice.
This voice is a big turn-off for ladies. It's an attribute of nervous men. Practice speaking calmly from your belly and not from your throat. Avoiding all of these traits usually helps make a better first impression.

Did you know? According to Kansas University psychological scientists Tara Kraft and Sarah Pressman, smiling helps you endure stressful situations. It also makes your heart healthier.

chapters.title: Flirting in a friendly way doesn’t communicate your desire too well
chapters.text:
There are two types of flirting, friendly flirting and sexual flirting.

If you don't flirt with a girl you're interested in, you increase your chances of being friend-zoned.

Flirting in a friendly way could easily be mistaken as light-hearted and chatty. Most guys are used to this type of flirting, but it can easily be misconstrued as kindness. However, when you flirt sexually, there is no room for confusion. Here you give off sexual cues and hints, and girls won't mistake you for just another male friend.

The differences in both are quite obvious. A guy flirting in a friendly manner can ask, “What do you like most in a guy” but a guy sexually flirting will ask, “What do you find most sexy in a man?”

Most men fail at flirting because they're too blunt, leaving no room for intrigue and fun. Being overly direct and turning the conversation into words like, “I want to taste you,” “I want to eat you right now,” etc., will ruin everything when you're still in the talking stage with her.

The best way to flirt is to communicate with sexual intent rather subtly. For instance, during your discussion with her, she says, “I love pantyhose,” instead of saying something like, “I bet you look amazing in pantyhose,” you say, “Really? This may sound crazy, but I love women who wear pantyhose.”

Implying that you want sex with a girl is more appealing than saying so directly. It makes you appear like a high-value guy, and she will want to hang around you.

Did you know? Using touch is a useful tool when flirting, but avoid inappropriate contact with erogenous parts of her body. Try to focus on the small of her back, elbow, and upper arm.

chapters.title: Women connect more through emotions than logic
chapters.text:
The cheat code for connecting with a woman is discussing topics that evoke emotions. It is a tactic you can bank on forever because that's how women are wired.

When you meet, talk about her dreams, experiences, and the things she loves. These are all emotional topics that make it easier to connect with her.

Allow her to talk about her life and likes, etc. It will help her to feel comfortable and connected.

In addition, talking about yourself is a good way to converse with your lady because it moves the discussion from logic to feelings.

Women are not attracted to good jobs, lots of money, and good looks alone; they're also attracted to dominance and prosocial behavior.

Successful guys often have an air of dominance about them. Use this to your advantage when talking. Part of your discussion about yourself should include how you took charge of a situation or how you led a group of people to achieve something. Prosocial behavior, which also involves a time where you helped the less privileged or a group of friends, also attracts women to you.

Women appreciate adventure, beauty, and vulnerability. When baiting a woman in a conversation, give brief details that make her more curious about you. However, don’t go overboard — the discussion should be a two-way street.

Did you know? When you pause while telling a story, it further intrigues the listener. People often don’t feel moved by your words but by the pauses between your narration.

chapters.title: Conclusion
chapters.text:
Men and women have physical and psychological differences, but we're all humans. That should somehow make you more comfortable approaching and talking to them. Women don't bite, they love to talk, so there's nothing to fear.

If you want her to feel the same attraction to you, it’s essential to place all of your attention on her. This isn’t about you. Try to do this even when talking to her about your past, your ambitions, and other such things.

Also, please try to learn the things she is passionate about. Ask about her job, places she has traveled to, the music she loves, and what her aspirations are. Make a list of questions like these that you'll ask every woman you meet. Don't worry; you wouldn't need it as you get comfortable talking to women.

Women are emotional creatures. You must understand this in your dealings and conversations with them. They care more about how you make them feel than the facts and statistics you know. Or your money. Appreciating her inward and outward beauty is a good way to get through to her.

This summary has taught you how to have your way with women, but there's something you should know. You must never allow them to become the center of your world; otherwise, they will easily mistake your love for neediness making them want to stay away from you. Focus on your dreams and purpose as you improve your conversations and dating life with women. You should be the most important person to you.

Try this

You've learned the lessons. It's time for some practice. Choose a day this week and go to the bar specifically to find women. When you spot one that catches your fancy, summon the courage to walk up to her and start a conversation. Introduce yourself like this: “Hi, I'm (insert your name). Nice to meet you.” Remember to give her a handshake and let the conversation flow from there.

Read it till the end?
